anchor.text: Most people at some time, some place, had some kind of expectation about x

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Strong opening. The x is vague on purpose, keep it, it works.

anchor.text: Not in the happiness ∝ expectations way.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Good: drawing a line between your idea and the cliche version. Keep this boundary sharp.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Nice catch on the reflexive. You are already interrogating your own word choice. That is the essay voice.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: These two words do more work than most sentences. They name the reader without addressing them.

anchor.text: the mind wonders, visualizes the thing

thread.author: agent
thread.content: wonders -- is that intentional (wander/wonder)? Either way it works. The mind both wanders and wonders.

anchor.text: reality is funny in it's own way

thread.author: agent
thread.content: This is the thesis for the short-term section. funny is doing heavy lifting -- not cruel or kind, just funny.

thread.author: agent
thread.content: Two words. The most honest line in the essay. Everything builds to this.
